script:
BURL=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-url --query value -o tsv)
BTOK=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name edge-bridge-token --query value -o tsv)
echo "bridge=$BURL"
curl -s -m 5 -o /dev/null -w "health=%{http_code}\n" -H "Authorization: Bearer $BTOK" "$BURL/health"

ej() {
  curl -s -m 20 -X POST -H "Authorization: Bearer $BTOK" -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    "$BURL/edge/execute_js" --data "$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.dumps({"tab_url_contains":sys.argv[1],"js":sys.argv[2]}))' "$1" "$2")"
}

echo "=== nav to Heather catalog install page ==="
ej "admin.teams.microsoft.com" "location.href = 'https://admin.teams.microsoft.com/policies/manage-apps/922fe8e1-c937-4d74-a73f-66fcfc26da10/users-and-groups?action=installs'; 'nav'"
echo
sleep 10

echo "=== click Install app ==="
ej "admin.teams.microsoft.com" 'var b = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("button,[role=button]")).find(function(e){return e.offsetParent && (e.innerText||"").trim().endsWith("Install app");}); if(!b){JSON.stringify({err:"no_install"})}else{b.click();JSON.stringify({clicked:true})}'
echo
sleep 4

echo "=== click deployedToDropdown -> Specific users ==="
ej "admin.teams.microsoft.com" 'var d=document.getElementById("deployedToDropdown"); if(d){d.click();} JSON.stringify({clicked:!!d})'
sleep 2
ej "admin.teams.microsoft.com" 'var opt=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[role=option]")).find(function(e){return e.offsetParent && (e.innerText||"").indexOf("Specific users")>=0;}); if(opt){opt.click();} JSON.stringify({clicked:!!opt})'
echo
sleep 3

echo "=== type 'heather' in user picker ==="
ej "admin.teams.microsoft.com" 'var p=document.querySelector("input[aria-label=\"Search for users or groups\"]"); if(p){p.focus(); var s=Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype,"value").set; s.call(p,"heather"); p.dispatchEvent(new Event("input",{bubbles:true})); p.dispatchEvent(new Event("change",{bubbles:true})); p.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keydown",{bubbles:true,key:"r"})); p.dispatchEvent(new KeyboardEvent("keyup",{bubbles:true,key:"r"})); JSON.stringify({val:p.value})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_picker"})}'
echo
sleep 5

echo "=== click Dr. Heather suggestion ==="
ej "admin.teams.microsoft.com" 'var sugs=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("[role=option],button,div")).filter(function(e){return e.offsetParent && (e.innerText||"").indexOf("Heather")>=0 && (e.innerText||"").length<60;}); sugs.sort(function(a,b){return (a.innerText||"").length-(b.innerText||"").length}); if(sugs.length){sugs[0].click();JSON.stringify({clicked:true,t:sugs[0].innerText.slice(0,60)})}else{JSON.stringify({err:"no_sug"})}'
echo
sleep 3

echo "=== click Apply ==="
ej "admin.teams.microsoft.com" 'var b=document.getElementById("flexPaneApply"); if(b){b.click();} JSON.stringify({clicked:!!b})'
echo
sleep 6

echo "=== verify via Graph ==="
RT_YM=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name yoomd-graph-refresh-token --query value -o tsv)
ITOK=$(curl -s -X POST 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/organizations/oauth2/v2.0/token' \
  -d 'client_id=14d82eec-204b-4c2f-b7e8-296a70dab67e' -d 'grant_type=refresh_token' \
  -d "refresh_token=$RT_YM" -d 'scope=TeamsAppInstallation.ReadWriteForUser.All offline_access' \
  | python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("access_token",""))')
CODE=$(curl -s -o /tmp/h-i -w '%{http_code}' -X POST "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/users/0e06a27c-11e0-442a-b6a7-10bedc7e4364/teamwork/installedApps" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $ITOK" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"teamsApp@odata.bind":"https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps/922fe8e1-c937-4d74-a73f-66fcfc26da10"}')
echo "graph install=$CODE"
head -c 250 /tmp/h-i; echo
rm -f /tmp/h-i
